node.text: Microsoft #FashionWeek. Day 3. Taking flight.
Microsoft #FashionWeek. Day 2. Denim in the Office.
Microsoft #FashionWeek. Day 1. Wholesome swag.
The new #Windows11 default background image is wavy. 🌊
This is our redesigned turtle emoji (swipe to check out the original). Please fill our replies with 🐢.
The Forza Horizon 5 Limited Edition @Xbox Wireless Controller. Please and thank you.
Certified Paper Clip
*types in the chat*

What's cool about Artificial Intelligence being used to help save endangered Asian wild horses? Everything.

Check out our Story for more.

node.text: Feeling very retro. Very retro. 🚀
You're welcome.
Like this post if you’ve ever painted something in Microsoft Paint.

Sharing a little love in your feed, courtesy of our redesigned red heart emoji.

Coming soon to Microsoft 365.

node.text: A thing of beauty. 💫
Are you able to find Clippy? 📎
Coming soon to Microsoft 365: the unicorn emoji, all glown up.
A year of progress and a decade of action. 💫

node.text: In collaboration with @StudioTendril, we created our entire Fluent emoji library using Cinema 4D and Figma.

Yes.

On the 10th anniversary of its original reveal at Comic-Con, the @gearsofwar Trike has a new home at the Microsoft Archives.

@Xbox don't be jealous.
Tetris for Windows, circa 1990.

Cat café.​
.​
This summer, the world had plans to visit Tokyo. But when travelers couldn’t get there, locals were able to share their favorite places to go via Microsoft Teams. Check out our Story for more.​

Kiki is a member of J pod, a close-knit family of 24 endangered Southern Resident orca whales, and she’s 6-years-old. 
.
Using the HoloLens2, audiences are immersed in an underwater experience and connect with J pod and Kiki to experience the power of echolocation, used by orcas to communicate and hunt. Noise pollution from human activity is disrupting that sonic ability, blinding the orcas in their search for food. This experience is the intersection between the story of a family's survival, how we rethink conservation, and how we engage with technology to create impact. Check out our Story for more.

node.text: Today, we’re announcing the redesign of our 1,800+ emoji — including the paperclip emoji. 👀 Swipe through for a small sample, and check out our Story for additional details.
If this gets 200k likes, we’ll replace the paperclip emoji in Microsoft 365 with Clippy.
